mapper.sql: ss.id, ss.member_id, ss.status, ss.last_message_preview, ss.last_message_at, ss.member_unread_count, ss.admin_unread_count, ss.created_at, ss.updated_at, u.username AS member_username, u.mail AS member_email, ss.sort_time AS sort_time
mapper.select: SELECT ss.id, ss.member_id, ss.status, ss.last_message_preview, ss.last_message_at, ss.member_unread_count, ss.admin_unread_count, ss.created_at, ss.updated_at, ss.sort_time AS sort_time FROM support_session ss WHERE ss.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM support_session ss INNER JOIN member_user u ON u.id = ss.member_id WHERE ss.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT ss.id, ss.member_id, ss.status, ss.last_message_preview, ss.last_message_at, ss.member_unread_count, ss.admin_unread_count, ss.created_at, ss.updated_at, ss.sort_time AS sort_time FROM support_session ss WHERE ss.member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM support_session ss INNER JOIN member_user u ON u.id = ss.member_id WHERE ss.member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1

SELECT ss.id, ss.member_id, ss.status, ss.last_message_preview, ss.last_message_at, ss.member_unread_count, ss.admin_unread_count, ss.created_at, ss.updated_at, ss.sort_time AS sort_time FROM support_session ss WHERE ss.id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE support_session SET last_message_preview = #{preview}, last_message_at = #{createdAt}, sort_time = #{createdAt}, admin_unread_count = admin_unread_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE support_session SET last_message_preview = #{preview}, last_message_at = #{createdAt}, sort_time = #{createdAt}, member_unread_count = member_unread_count + 1, admin_unread_count = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
